justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "after-tomorrow at 10h" and "around the same time."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user for a different time or day, rather than proactively suggesting alternative slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was mostly efficient, with the agent only making one slightly redundant API call by checking for a specific time when the user had indicated flexibility.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was workable but slightly tiring due to the agent's repeated apologies and lack of proactive suggestions for available slots.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context well throughout the conversation, even when the user changed their preferences multiple times.
